title: The Banaras Hindu University Act, 1915
full_text: The Banaras Hindu University Act, 1915 काशी हिन्‍दू विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम,1915 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 191516 Act Number: 16 Enactment Date: 1915-10-01 Act Year: 1915 Short Title: The Banaras Hindu University Act, 1915 Hindi Title: काशी हिन्‍दू विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम,1915 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate a teaching and residential Hindu University at Banaras. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 01-04-1916 Last Updated: 03-12-2018 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE. Incorporation. Section 4. University open to all classes, castes and creeds. Section 4A. Powers of the University. Section 5. Visitor. Section 6. Officers of the University. Section 7. Chancellor. Section 7A. Powers of Chancellor. Section 7B. Vice-Chancellor. Section 7C. Powers and duties of Vice-Chancellor. Section 8. The Academic Council. Section 12. [Omitted.]. Section 12A. Other authorities. Section 12B. Disqualifications. Section 13. Audit of accounts. Section 13A. Annual Report. Section 14. Conditions of service of officers and teachers. Section 16C. Proceedings not to be invalidated by vacancies, etc. Section 16D. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 17. Statutes.
